title: ixeridium dentatum
intro: Ixeridium dentatum, also known as the toothed ixeridium, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Ixeridium dentatum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Ixeridium dentatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, tonics, and salves for topical application.
